admin_password.desc: Password required to use in-game admin commands (AdminPassword). Leave blank for none, but this is strongly recommended to set.

password.desc: Set the join password for your server (JoinPassword). Leave blank for none.

port.desc: UDP port the server will bind to (-Port).

query_port.desc: UDP query port used for server listing (-QueryPort).

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/icarus && until [ -f /tmp/icarus/IcarusServer.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2089300 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2089300 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/icarus +login anonymous +app_update 2089300 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/icarus/IcarusServer.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/icarus/. . && rm -rf /tmp/icarus'

run.command: sh -c 'id -u icarus >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m icarus || adduser -D icarus; mkdir -p /home/icarus/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/icarus/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/icarus/.steam/sdk64/; fi; CFG=./Icarus/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/ServerSettings.ini; mkdir -p ./Icarus/Saved/Config/WindowsServer; if [ -f "$CFG" ]; then sed -i "s/^SessionName=.*/SessionName=${name}/" "$CFG" || echo "SessionName=${name}" >> "$CFG"; sed -i "s/^JoinPassword=.*/JoinPassword=${password}/" "$CFG" || echo "JoinPassword=${password}" >> "$CFG"; sed -i "s/^AdminPassword=.*/AdminPassword=${admin_password}/" "$CFG" || echo "AdminPassword=${admin_password}" >> "$CFG"; sed -i "s/^MaxPlayers=.*/MaxPlayers=${players}/" "$CFG" || echo "MaxPlayers=${players}" >> "$CFG"; fi; chown -R icarus:icarus . /home/icarus/.steam; exec runuser -u icarus -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/icarus/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./IcarusServer.exe -SteamServerName="${name}" -Port=${port} -QueryPort=${query_port} -Log'
